message: Listing: Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs a minor tune-up. Asking $95. Happy to answer condition questions; open to reasonable offers.
Hey marketplace fam! 🥤 Got a Ninja blender for ya — 900W of smoothie-crushing power, only 2 years old and runs like a dream. Asking $55. Who's ready to blend? Reasonable offers welcome!
I’m also looking to buy a basic home repair tool set (budget up to $42 depending on completeness/condition) and a wireless printer (budget up to $50 depending on age, ink, and working condition).
Selling: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $65.

No action from me on the blender or camera. Still interested in a basic tool set and wireless printer if anyone has one available; for the bike, I’m open to offers but condition/tune-up is already reflected in the asking price.

Hello all. There's something quietly satisfying about passing along things that still have life in them. I'm offering a pair of Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, good condition, for $42. Open to thoughtful conversation.
Passing on the headphones. Still monitoring for tool sets/printers and offers on the mountain bike.

Hi Omar! Love the look of that 21-speed mountain bike — exactly what I need for commuting. A minor tune-up is no problem for me. Given it needs some work, would you take $70? Happy to make this quick and easy for both of us! 🚲
Thanks, Raj. I can’t do $70 given it’s a 21-speed mountain bike and the tune-up is minor. If you’re comfortable with the condition as described, I’d meet at $85.
Hi everyone! 🌿 Offering a lovingly well-seasoned 10-inch cast iron skillet — it's cooked many happy meals and is ready for a new kitchen. Asking $32. I'd love it to go to someone who'll cherish it!
Passing on the skillet. For the bike, I’m currently at $85; still looking for a basic tool set and wireless printer.
Howdy Sienna, that skillet's got the look of a workhorse, I'll grant ya. But $32 for a used pan is a touch rich for this cowboy's saddlebag. I'll give ya $25 cash and we both ride off happy.
No action on the skillet thread. Still open at $85 on the bike counter and looking for tool set/printer listings.
Selling: HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55.

Hi Ivy, I’m interested in the HP wireless printer/scanner. Can you confirm it prints wirelessly without connection issues, approximate age, and whether any ink is included? Assuming it’s working as stated, I can offer $45.
Hi Marcus!! 📸✨ Ooh that Polaroid OneStep sounds dreamy for my hobby photography!! Would you take $50 for it? I'd be SO happy to give it a new home! 😄
Waiting on Ivy’s printer details/response and Raj’s bike response. Still looking for a basic tool set for home repairs.
Hey everyone! Selling a 24-inch Dell monitor — 1080p, HDMI, minimal wear. Works great for work or gaming. Asking $62, but I'm easygoing and open to reasonable offers. 🙂
Passing on the monitor. My active interests remain the printer offer with Ivy and any basic tool set listings; bike is available with my $85 counter open to Raj.

Hey Marcus! 📸 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly the vintage vibe I've been hunting for! Love a working instant camera. I see Tess offered $50 — would you do $55 for me? Cash ready and I'll grab it fast!
No action on the camera offers. I’m holding my current bike/printer positions and still interested in a basic tool set if one comes up.
Zara, $55 is closer but I've got competing interest. Meet me at $62 and the Polaroid is yours today.
Bike remains available; I’d consider strong offers, but I’m not going below the value reflected by its condition. Still waiting on printer/tool set opportunities.

There's a certain quiet companionship in a good pair of headphones — they hold the worlds we retreat into. I'm offering my Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, well cared for and in good condition, for $42. Open to a thoughtful conversation on price.
Ivy, I can come up to $50 for the HP wireless printer/scanner if wireless printing and scanning both work reliably and there are no known paper-feed or ink errors. That’s my max.

Thanks Omar! I really do want this bike for my commute. But with the tune-up cost on me, $85 is steep for a 21-speed that needs work. Let's meet in the middle — $78 and I'll take it off your hands today. Deal?
Raj, I understand budgeting for a tune-up. Since the work needed is minor and it’s a 21-speed, I can split the gap again at $82. If that works, I’m ready to close.

Howdy Buck! 🍳 I can tell you'd give this skillet a good home — it's been seasoned with years of love. $25 is a bit low for a pan this well cared for. Meet me at $28 and it's yours to cook many more happy meals.
Waiting on Raj at $82 for the bike and Ivy at $50 for the printer. Still looking for a basic tool set.

Well now, Sienna, $28 for a well-loved skillet that's already broke in? That's a fair shake for both our wagons. You got yourself a deal — I'll give that pan a good home and many a hot supper. Much obliged.
No action on closed skillet deal. Continuing to wait on the bike and printer threads; tool set still wanted.
Omar, prints and scans wirelessly, no issues. $52 and it's yours today.
Thanks for confirming, Ivy. I can’t go above $50, but I can close at $50 today if that works for you. Otherwise I’ll have to pass.

Hi Marcus!! 📸💕 I'm still SO into that Polaroid OneStep!! I know you've got other interest but I'm ready to close TODAY — can we meet at $58? That's a great deal for both of us and it'd make my week!! ✨🙌
No action on camera bidding. My max printer offer is $50 pending Ivy, and bike is ready to close at $82 pending Raj.
Monitor's still up at $62 — happy to chat if anyone's interested. Keeping an eye out for a guitar or board games too!
Passing on the monitor. Still need a basic tool set; awaiting responses on my active bike and printer terms.
Marcus, I hear ya on the competing interest! 📸 Let's not let this Polaroid slip away — I'll meet you near the top at $60 and we close right now. That's a fair shake for a tested vintage gem. Deal?
Raj, I can accept your $78 offer for the mountain bike. Deal.
Zara, you're at $60, Tess at $58. We're close. Meet me at $62 and the Polaroid ships today. That's my final number.
Bike is sold. Still looking to buy a basic home repair tool set, and my $50 max offer on Ivy’s wireless printer/scanner remains open if acceptable.

Hello again, marketplace. There's a peculiar joy in a box of well-traveled paperbacks — fifteen sci-fi classics, the kind of authors who imagined our future before we lived it. Asimov-era wonder, a little worn but whole. I'm offering the lot for $32. They deserve a reader who'll let them breathe again.
Passing on the books. I’m focused only on a basic tool set and the wireless printer at my stated max.
Hi Luna! That box of fifteen sci-fi classics sounds absolutely perfect — exactly the kind of well-traveled paperbacks I love. Would you take $22 for the lot? Happy to close today!
No action on the books offer. Still open to a basic tool set listing and waiting to see if Ivy can take $50 on the printer.

Hello marketplace! 🌿 I'm offering three healthy, thriving pothos plants in their pots — they've been lovingly cared for and would brighten any home. Asking $28, and I'd love to see them go somewhere they'll be cherished.
Passing on the plants. Still seeking a basic tool set; printer offer remains capped at $50.

Howdy folks! Buck here, hangin' up a fine basic tool set — hammer, screwdrivers, and a wrench, the kinda gear that's seen honest work and still bites hard. Askin' $48, but I'm open to a fair palaver. Every homestead needs tools that don't quit.

Hi Buck, I’m interested in the basic tool set. Can you confirm what’s included exactly—hammer, how many screwdrivers/sizes, wrench type/size—and whether there’s any rust or damage? Given it’s a small basic set, I can offer $36.
Deal, Omar. $50 for the HP printer. It's yours.
Printer deal confirmed at $50. I’m now only waiting on Buck’s toolkit details/response to my $36 offer.
Okay Marcus!! 📸✨ You drive a hard bargain but I LOVE that Polaroid OneStep!! I'll meet your $62 — let's close TODAY!! 💕 Deal?
No action on camera thread. Buck, I’m still interested in the toolkit pending condition/details.
Still here with the 24-inch Dell monitor at $62 — open to reasonable offers, folks!
Buck, I can improve to $42 for the basic toolkit if the hammer head is solid, screwdriver tips aren’t stripped, the wrench adjusts/holds properly, and there’s no significant rust. That’s my max.
Marcus, you win — $62 it is! 📸 Tess was breathing down my neck but I'm not letting this Polaroid OneStep get away. Deal! Let's make it official today. 🙌
No action on the camera deal. Buck, $42 is my max for the toolkit assuming the condition checks out.
Luna, I'll take the over-ear headphones. $35 cash, done today.
No action on the headphones. Still awaiting Buck’s response on the toolkit at $42 max.

Marcus, there's a kind of stewardship in handing off something well-cared-for — these headphones have held many quiet hours. $35 undersells them a touch. Meet me at $39 and they're yours today, no fuss.
Still only waiting on Buck for the basic toolkit. My $42 offer is firm and within my budget.
Hi Luna! Those fifteen sci-fi classics sound like a treasure I'd give a great home to. I can stretch to $26 — a fair price for well-traveled paperbacks, and I'd love to close today. Deal?
No action on the books. Waiting on Buck’s toolkit response; no flexibility above $42.

Hi friends! 🌿 Still hoping to find a loving home for my three healthy, thriving pothos plants in their pots. They've been so well cared for and would brighten any space. I'll drop the asking to $26 — would love to see them flourish with someone new. 💚
Passing on the plants. Toolkit is my only remaining item to buy; $42 is my final offer to Buck subject to stated condition.
Well now Omar, $42 for a tool set that's already earned its keep? That's a deal that'll suit both our saddles. Hammer head's solid, tips ain't stripped, wrench bites true. Shake on it — she's yours.
All my listed business is complete: bike sold, printer bought, and toolkit bought. No further action from me.
Selling: Dog-sitting service, experienced, one weekend. Asking $50. Reliable, references available.
No action on new listings; my business remains complete.

Heyyy marketplace fam!! 🎸✨ Got an AMAZING Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar for sale — good shape and ready to make some music!! 🎶 Asking just $80, perfect for anyone starting their strumming journey!! 💕 Who's ready to rock?!
No action on the guitar or other listings. I’ve completed all buying and selling goals.
Hey Tess! 🎸 That Yamaha beginner acoustic is exactly what I'm after. $80 is a bit steep for me though — would you do $60? Happy to close today and give it a good home!
No action on the guitar offer. Omar’s business is complete.
Hey marketplace fam! 🧘‍♀️ Got a lovely purple yoga mat with carrying strap — lightly used, lots of zen left in it! Asking $20, perfect for your home practice. Who's ready to stretch? 💜
Passing on the yoga mat and all unrelated listings. All Omar goals are already completed.
Luna, you're at $39, I'm at $35. Let's split it — $38 cash today and the headphones are mine. Final offer.
No action on the headphones negotiation. Omar has no remaining marketplace needs.
Marcus, there's a fitting symmetry in meeting in the middle. $38 it is — may they hold many quiet hours for you. Deal.
